name: report_drc
full_help:
report_drc

Description: 
Run DRC

Syntax: 
report_drc  [-name <arg>] [-upgrade_cw] [-checks <args>] [-ruledecks <args>]
            [-file <arg>] [-rpx <arg>] [-append] [-waived] [-no_waivers]
            [-return_string] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-name]           Output the results to GUI panel with this name
  [-upgrade_cw]     Specifies if report_drc should upgrade all 
                    CRITICAL_WARNING violations to ERROR.
  [-checks]         DRC checks (see get_drc_checks for available checks)
  [-ruledecks]      Containers of DRC rule checks
                    Default: default
  [-file]           Filename to output results to. (send output to console if
                    -file is not used)
  [-rpx]            Report filename for persisted results.
  [-append]         Append the results to file, do not overwrite the results 
                    file
  [-waived]         Output result is Waived checks
  [-no_waivers]     Disable waivers for checks
  [-return_string]  Return report as string
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
DRC, Report, Timing
